name: Southern African Development Community
climate: Tropical in the north, semi-arid in the interior, Mediterranean in the southwest, oceanic in island states

neighbors.name: East African Community
neighbors.relevance: Tanzania and DRC hold dual membership; trade corridor between southern and eastern Africa

neighbors.name: African Union
neighbors.relevance: Parent continental body; SADC is a recognized AU regional economic community

neighbors.name: Cape of Good Hope Sea Route
neighbors.relevance: South Africa anchors the Cape route; critical for SADC mineral and energy exports

neighbors.name: Indo-Pacific
neighbors.relevance: Indian Ocean coast connects Mozambique, Tanzania, Madagascar to Asian trade routes

neighbors.name: Belt and Road Initiative
neighbors.relevance: Chinese mining investments and infrastructure projects across the region

links.description: All SADC members are AU members; SADC free trade area feeds into AfCFTA
Tanzania and DRC are members of both; coordination on customs and transit
Cape route handles bulk mineral exports (platinum, iron ore, coal) from South Africa to Asia
South Africa is a BRICS member; diplomatic and trade bridge between SADC and emerging powers
Angola is an OPEC member; oil production and pricing affect regional revenues
EU is a major trade partner; Economic Partnership Agreements govern market access for SADC exports
